response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified dialogue followed by a song transition at 03:50. 2. Detected text "スパークル" (Sparkle) and "作詞・作曲 野田洋次郎" (Lyrics/Composition: Yojiro Noda) on-screen. 3. Used the search query "Sparkle RADWIMPS Japanese and English lyrics" to find song information. 4. Identified performers as Shion Murasaki and Sakamata Chloe. 5. Compiled the scene breakdown and lyric snippets.
response.global_summary: The video features a dialogue sequence between virtual characters Shion Murasaki and Sakamata Chloe, followed by a performance of the song 'Sparkle' by both characters.

scenes.description: Dialogue sequence between Shion Murasaki and Sakamata Chloe.
Shion Murasaki and Sakamata Chloe perform 'Sparkle'. Song title and composer are displayed on-screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
まだこの世界は 僕を飼い慣らしてたいみたいだ
望み通りいいだろう 美しくもがくよ
互いの砂時計 眺めながらキスをしようよ
「さよなら」から一番遠い 場所で待ち合わせよう
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
It seems this world still wants to tame me
Fine, just as you wish, I'll struggle beautifully
Let's kiss while watching each other's hourglasses
Let's meet at the place farthest from "goodbye"
